is what is my level and what is my favorite accent do i want to learn the american accent or

first of all what is your level well you should consider two different levels

so let's sum up the first part of this lesson if you are below the intermediate level go to

time for second question how can we lessen two podcasts in order to improve our listening
if you want to improve your listening through podcasts you have to follow these three steps
step one is to lessen don't worry about anything you don't have to understand 100 of what they are
saying you don't have to take notes just listen the important thing is that your ears are getting
used to the sounds you're hearing and that you can get the gist of the story what is going on
who are the main speakers what is the topic of the podcast that's enough and the good part about the
first step is that you can do it anywhere you can listen to podcasts while you were sitting down or
maybe while you were doing the dishes you can also listen to podcasts while you are walking on the
street or maybe you are waiting for the bus or you know you can listen to it anywhere you want and
as many times as you need step 2 lesson and write down now listen guys this step might take a lot of
time but trust me there is no shortcut in learning you need to spend time so do it and don't be lazy
what you need to do here is to listen to the podcast pause after each sentence and
write down what you heard so basically you're going to write down the script of the podcast
maybe sometimes you don't understand what they are saying pause go back lesson again again if
you need you can go back and listen again do this as many times as you need in order to understand
what the podcast the speaker is saying so that you can write it down what if i don't understand what
they are saying well in that case if you couldn't understand what they are saying after a few times
of playing it and listening to it then just leave it blank and continue with the rest of the podcast
alright by the end of this step you will write down the script of the podcast what is step three
lesson and follow the original script whether you listen to voa or bbc podcasts the script is
available in a pdf file format so what you need to do is to download that file play the podcast
and while you are listening to the podcast follow the script this time you will understand what they
are saying a hundred percent now and step four the final step is to compare your script to the
original script to see which parts you have made a mistake which parts you couldn't get
and which parts you left blank this exercise takes a lot of time guys but trust me you will see
immediate results plus not only it improves your listening you can also learn some new vocabulary
so basically you're killing two birds with one stone and to kill two birds with one stone means
to achieve two things by doing one thing i hope you've enjoyed this lesson if you want
